underlying_goal: Continue an automated Ultra Builder Pro development workflow to complete Task #21 (UI panels), including code review, fixes, testing, committing, and merging to main
friction_detail: The review coordinator's final verdict was REQUEST_CHANGES (overwriting the earlier COMMENT verdict), but Claude had already merged the branch, requiring post-hoc justification that P1 issues were by-design.
